name: Spinach Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the frozen spinach completely and press out as much water as possible.
2. In a saucepan, heat the rice milk until hot but not boiling. Stir in the flour until combined.
3. Add the nutritional yeast and cooked spinach to the saucepan. Cook over low heat for about 3-4 minutes, stirring constantly until thick and gooey.
4. In a separate pan, sauté the onion and garlic until the onion is tender. Add the tomatoes, mushrooms, and spices, then cook until just done.
5. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
6. Split each pita bread into two round flat pieces using a very sharp knife. Place each piece on a cookie sheet or pizza pan.
7. Spread the spinach sauce evenly over each pita piece.
8. Top with the tomato mixture, being careful not to let the juice drip onto the crust.
9. Bake for 5-7 minutes, watching closely to ensure the edges do not burn. This recipe makes enough for five individual pizzas.
